claude_findings.p2_fixed_summary: Added increment_retry_attempt pinning to the S18 policy validator, unit fail-closed matrix, and RP00 validator live rejection matrix.

human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: CP00-014 closes RP00.P02.M05.S18 after final validation and commit, then hands off to RP00.P02.M05.S19 without claiming source micro-phase completion, retry enqueue, retry execution, retry queue writes, retry attempt writes, retry schedule persistence, retry timer starts, retry worker dispatch, rollback execution, compensation execution, operator escalation writes, customer notifications, incident trace writes, observability events, blocked-output writes, approval/review writes, runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ execution, permission-engine or security-trimming execution, audit writes, database/storage/product-state persistence, service execution, runtime route creation, Claude runtime review, UI creation, or real data use.
